description: From plain, solid colours to patterned designs, there is something for every little girl here. These can be bought as essential back to school wear, as well as for special occasions. The patterned designs allow these to be matched with pretty dresses and skirts very easily and quickly. The cotton rich material is also quick drying, reducing the wait after washing. A great investment as these are available in a 3 pair pack so you can alternate between them throughout the week. Act quickly and get yours today whilst our stocks last!If you have any questions about this product then please get in touch with our customer service team. We aim to reply within 24 hours during office hours (9-5.30pm Mon-Fri).
